name: codex-augment-dispatcher
description: A polished owner-agent dispatcher for reliable cross-harness delivery, dynamic workflow artifacts, MCP helpers, subagent fanout, high-quality media guidance, GSAP motion guidance, deterministic asset workflows, and ui-ux-closed-loop orchestration with external references.

interface.shortDescription: Route complex work through workflows, reviews, subagents, frontend/media helpers, and release-grade evidence.
interface.longDescription: Codex Augment Dispatcher is an adapter hub for owner-agent orchestration across Codex, Pi, Claude Code, Grok, and similar CLIs. It keeps one owner responsible for edits and final claims while routing specialist work through reliable-agent-workflow, dynamic-workflow, task-gate/thinking-gate, grok-augment, AGY frontend, GSAP/ScrollTrigger motion guidance, asset-slicer, mcp-generator, dispatcher MCP tools, and ui-ux-closed-loop. It supports platform-neutral workflow artifacts, approval gates, packet/result lifecycles, launch recipes for real subagent fanout and worker-agent fanout, record-result ingestion, Claude Code Dynamic Workflows / ultracode / .claude/workflows interop, high-quality image/video asset defaults, and deterministic generated-asset checks. SVG and emoji are prohibited as default visual assets; custom icons default to image_gen sheets sliced with asset-slicer. External design and verification skills such as frontend-design, ui-ux-pro-max, wireframe prototyping, Vercel guidelines, and official GSAP skills are referenced by install guidance and composition rather than vendored wholesale.
defaultPrompt: Before non-trivial work, classify the route and preserve Plugin evidence.
Use reliable-agent-workflow, dynamic-workflow, task-gate, AGY, GSAP, ui-ux, image_gen, and slicer helpers when they apply.
Use subagents for fanout; reference-site UI needs style-review before AGY; owner verifies.
